name: Exec memo with buried lede, hedge stack, and unsourced numbers
draft:
Subject: Q3 thoughts

Hi team,

I hope you're well. Over the past several months, our team has been doing a lot of work to leverage AI in our pricing flow. We've been at the intersection of pricing strategy and machine learning, and I wanted to share some thoughts on where this could potentially go.

As you may know, we ran a number of experiments. The results were quite interesting — we observed what we believe could be a meaningful uplift in conversion. Some users seemed to respond very positively to the new flow. It's worth noting that the data is still being analyzed, but early signs are encouraging.

We considered several different approaches. There were a number of ways we could have structured the test. Ultimately, we landed on what we felt was a comprehensive approach that would give us robust signal.

Going forward, we believe there's a significant opportunity to expand this work. Next steps could include a broader rollout, more experiments, and additional analysis. We're excited to drive impact in this space.

Happy to chat anytime. Thanks for considering!

Best,
Alex

expected_flags.quote_contains: I wanted to share some thoughts
